project.name: 直播切片工具 UI 设计
project.styleDefinitionBrief: 直播切片工具桌面端UI设计，苹果风格，深色为主，蓝色强调，紧凑信息密度，专业工具感
project.designRead: desktop tool UI / content creators / professional restrained / information-dense / avoid playful or decorative

colorSystem.primaryColorRole: Apple Blue #007AFF for primary actions and active states
colorSystem.brandHuePolicy: single brand blue hue; state colors for success/warning/error only

styleContinuityAnchors.shapeSystem: radius 14px for cards, 10px for buttons/inputs, 8px for small controls, pill for chips
styleContinuityAnchors.typographySystem: SF Pro Display / PingFang SC, 13px body, 600 weight headings
styleContinuityAnchors.spacingSystem: compact: 16px card padding, 20px page margins, 12px section gaps
styleContinuityAnchors.componentLanguage: border-defined cards, subtle elevation, capsule buttons, clean inputs
styleContinuityAnchors.surfaceAndDepth: border-first, shadow alpha <= 0.05 for static, deeper for overlays only

sharedProjectShellContract.navigationShell: left sidebar 200px with icon+label nav items, active state with blue left border and blue tint background, app logo at top
sharedProjectShellContract.primaryColorSystem: Apple Blue #007AFF, no secondary brand hue
sharedProjectShellContract.typographySystem: SF Pro Display, PingFang SC, 13px body, 15px section titles, 20px page titles, weight 500-600
sharedProjectShellContract.surfaceDepthModel: 1px border default, no shadow on static cards, subtle shadow on hover
sharedProjectShellContract.ctaStyle: pill-shaped primary buttons with blue fill, rounded secondary buttons with border
sharedProjectShellContract.alignmentRules: left-aligned content, 20px page margins, 16px card padding, 12px element gaps

pages.title: 仪表盘
pages.visualNorthStar: Clean dashboard with stat cards, action cards, and session history in Apple dark theme

continuityAnchors.typographySystem: SF Pro Display / PingFang SC, 13px body
continuityAnchors.componentLanguage: border-defined cards, capsule buttons, clean stat displays

pages.title: 多房间管理
pages.visualNorthStar: Multi-room management with room cards grid, detail panel, timeline, and recording controls

continuityAnchors.typographySystem: SF Pro Display / PingFang SC, 13px body
continuityAnchors.componentLanguage: border-defined room cards, overlay controls, timeline clips

pages.title: 设置
pages.visualNorthStar: Settings page with grouped sections, toggle switches, dropdowns, and input fields

continuityAnchors.typographySystem: SF Pro Display / PingFang SC, 13px body
continuityAnchors.componentLanguage: grouped setting rows, toggle switches, clean form fields
